timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Yalta Conference concludes
description: Churchill, Roosevelt, and Stalin end the Yalta Conference after negotiating the postwar order in Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Potsdam Conference opens
description: The wartime allies meet again at Potsdam as tensions over Germany and Eastern Europe sharpen.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Churchill delivers the Iron Curtain speech
description: Winston Churchill warns that an 'Iron Curtain' has descended across Europe, giving a memorable phrase to the new divide.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Truman Doctrine is announced
description: President Harry Truman commits the United States to supporting states resisting communist pressure.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Marshall Plan is proposed
description: The United States unveils a major economic recovery program for Europe that becomes a pillar of containment.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Berlin Blockade begins
description: The Soviet Union blocks land access to West Berlin, prompting a massive Western airlift.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: NATO is founded
description: Twelve countries sign the North Atlantic Treaty, creating a collective defense alliance.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Soviet Union tests its first atomic bomb
description: The Soviet nuclear test ends the United States monopoly on atomic weapons.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: People's Republic of China is proclaimed
description: Mao Zedong declares the founding of the People's Republic of China, transforming the global balance of power.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Korean War begins
description: North Korean forces cross the 38th parallel, turning Korea into the first major hot war of the Cold War.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Stalin dies
description: Joseph Stalin's death opens a transition in Soviet leadership and policy.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Warsaw Pact is signed
description: The Soviet Union and its allies formalize a military bloc in Eastern Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Sputnik 1 is launched
description: The Soviet Union places the first artificial satellite into orbit, intensifying the superpower technological competition.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Construction of the Berlin Wall begins
description: East Germany seals the border in Berlin, creating the most visible symbol of the divided Cold War order.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Cuban Missile Crisis begins
description: The discovery of Soviet missiles in Cuba triggers the most dangerous nuclear confrontation of the Cold War.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Warsaw Pact forces invade Czechoslovakia
description: The Prague Spring is crushed by a Soviet-led military intervention.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: SALT I is signed
description: The United States and the Soviet Union sign agreements limiting parts of their strategic nuclear arsenals.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Soviet invasion of Afghanistan begins
description: The Soviet military intervenes in Afghanistan, deepening East-West tensions and provoking a long war.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Berlin Wall opens
description: East German authorities open border crossings in Berlin, signaling the collapse of communist rule in Eastern Europe.

timeline_description: Major political, military, and diplomatic milestones in the global rivalry between the United States and the Soviet Union, from the end of World War II to the Soviet collapse.
title: Soviet Union is dissolved
description: The USSR formally ceases to exist, ending the Cold War bipolar order.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Octavian becomes Augustus
description: The Senate grants Octavian the title Augustus, conventionally marking the beginning of the Roman Empire.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Tiberius succeeds Augustus
description: After Augustus dies, Tiberius becomes emperor and secures the Julio-Claudian succession.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Roman conquest of Britain begins
description: Under Claudius, Rome launches the invasion that establishes long-term imperial rule in Britain.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Great Fire of Rome
description: A devastating fire ravages Rome during Nero's reign and reshapes the capital.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Vesuvius destroys Pompeii and Herculaneum
description: The eruption of Mount Vesuvius buries two Roman towns and becomes one of antiquity's best-documented disasters.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Trajan becomes emperor
description: Trajan begins a reign associated with expansion and the empire's greatest territorial reach.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Hadrian succeeds Trajan
description: Hadrian turns imperial policy toward consolidation and frontier defense.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Construction of Hadrian's Wall begins
description: Rome starts building the great frontier wall in northern Britain.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Constitutio Antoniniana extends citizenship
description: Caracalla grants Roman citizenship to nearly all free inhabitants of the empire.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Crisis of the Third Century begins
description: The murder of Severus Alexander opens a long era of civil war, invasions, and political instability.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Diocletian becomes emperor
description: Diocletian begins sweeping reforms that stabilize the empire after prolonged crisis.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Tetrarchy is established
description: Diocletian reorganizes imperial rule among two senior and two junior emperors.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Edict of Milan is issued
description: Constantine and Licinius proclaim religious toleration for Christians in the empire.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Constantinople is inaugurated
description: Constantine formally dedicates Constantinople as an imperial capital.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Romans are defeated at Adrianople
description: The Eastern Roman army suffers a major defeat by the Goths and Emperor Valens is killed.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: The empire is permanently divided
description: After Theodosius I dies, the empire is divided between eastern and western courts.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Visigoths sack Rome
description: Alaric's forces capture and sack Rome, shocking the Roman world.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Romulus Augustulus is deposed
description: Odoacer removes the last western emperor, a conventional date for the fall of the Western Roman Empire.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Justinian I becomes emperor
description: Justinian's reign begins a major eastern Roman revival in law, warfare, and building.

timeline_description: Key political, military, administrative, and religious milestones in the history of the Roman Empire from Augustus to the fall of Constantinople.
title: Constantinople falls to the Ottomans
description: The Ottoman conquest of Constantinople ends the eastern Roman imperial line.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Assembly of Notables meets
description: Louis XVI convenes the Assembly of Notables to address the monarchy's financial crisis, exposing deep political weakness.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Estates-General is summoned
description: The crown announces that the Estates-General will meet for the first time since 1614.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Estates-General opens
description: Representatives of the three estates gather at Versailles amid mounting expectations for reform.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Third Estate declares the National Assembly
description: The deputies of the Third Estate claim to represent the nation and assert a new source of sovereignty.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Tennis Court Oath is sworn
description: Deputies vow not to disband until France has a constitution.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Bastille is stormed
description: Parisians seize the Bastille in the revolution's defining early uprising.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Feudal privileges are abolished
description: The National Assembly votes to dismantle much of the feudal order.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Declaration of the Rights of Man and of the Citizen is adopted
description: The revolution proclaims principles of liberty, equality, and national sovereignty.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Women's March on Versailles begins
description: Market women and National Guards march to Versailles and force the royal family back to Paris.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Civil Constitution of the Clergy is enacted
description: The National Assembly reorganizes the Catholic Church under state authority.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Flight to Varennes begins
description: Louis XVI attempts to flee Paris but is captured, further discrediting the monarchy.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Constitution of 1791 is completed
description: France becomes a constitutional monarchy under the new constitution.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: France declares war on Austria
description: Revolutionary France enters a widening European war.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Tuileries Palace is stormed
description: Insurrection in Paris topples the monarchy in practice.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: National Convention abolishes the monarchy
description: The Convention proclaims the French Republic.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Louis XVI is executed
description: The former king is guillotined after being convicted of treason.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Reign of Terror begins
description: Emergency government and revolutionary tribunals intensify political repression.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Robespierre falls in the Thermidorian Reaction
description: Robespierre is overthrown, ending the high phase of the Terror.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Directory is established
description: A new constitution creates the Directory as the executive government of France.

timeline_description: Major political and social turning points in the French Revolution from the pre-revolutionary crisis to Napoleon's seizure of power.
title: Napoleon carries out the coup of 18 Brumaire
description: Napoleon Bonaparte overthrows the Directory and becomes first consul.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Bitcoin white paper is published
description: Satoshi Nakamoto releases the paper outlining a peer-to-peer electronic cash system.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Genesis block is mined
description: The Bitcoin network begins with the mining of block 0, the genesis block.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: First Bitcoin transaction is sent
description: Satoshi Nakamoto sends 10 bitcoins to Hal Finney in the first recorded Bitcoin transfer.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: First widely known commercial Bitcoin purchase occurs
description: Programmer Laszlo Hanyecz uses 10,000 bitcoins to buy two pizzas.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Mt. Gox becomes a major Bitcoin exchange
description: Mt. Gox begins operating as a Bitcoin exchange and soon becomes the dominant trading venue.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Bitcoin reaches parity with the U.S. dollar
description: The market price of one bitcoin reaches roughly one U.S. dollar for the first time.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: First major price surge and crash unfolds
description: Bitcoin climbs rapidly above $30 before collapsing, revealing its early volatility.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: First halving takes place
description: The block subsidy falls from 50 to 25 bitcoins, inaugurating Bitcoin's programmed supply cuts.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Blockchain splits temporarily after software incompatibility
description: A bug causes a temporary fork of the blockchain before the network reconverges.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: FBI shuts down Silk Road marketplace
description: U.S. authorities seize the online black market Silk Road and confiscate bitcoin linked to it.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: China restricts financial institutions from Bitcoin transactions
description: Chinese regulators move to curb formal financial sector involvement with Bitcoin.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Mt. Gox halts withdrawals and collapses
description: The failure of Mt. Gox becomes the first great exchange crisis in Bitcoin history.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Second halving takes place
description: Bitcoin's block subsidy falls from 25 to 12.5 bitcoins.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Bitcoin Cash hard fork occurs
description: A dispute over scaling produces a major split in the Bitcoin community and code base.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: First U.S. Bitcoin futures begin trading
description: Cboe launches regulated Bitcoin futures, a milestone in institutional market access.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Third halving takes place
description: The block subsidy falls from 12.5 to 6.25 bitcoins.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Tesla discloses a large Bitcoin purchase
description: Tesla reveals that it bought $1.5 billion in bitcoin, underscoring corporate interest in the asset.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: El Salvador adopts Bitcoin as legal tender
description: El Salvador becomes the first country to recognize Bitcoin as legal tender.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: SEC approves spot Bitcoin exchange-traded products
description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission approves the listing and trading of spot Bitcoin ETP shares.

timeline_description: Major technical, economic, and regulatory milestones in the development of Bitcoin from the white paper to mainstream financial adoption.
title: Fourth halving takes place
description: Bitcoin's block subsidy falls from 6.25 to 3.125 bitcoins.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: McCulloch and Pitts describe an artificial neuron
description: A mathematical model of neural networks helps establish one path for machine intelligence research.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Turing proposes the imitation game
description: Alan Turing publishes 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' and introduces the test later associated with his name.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Early game-playing AI programs are demonstrated
description: Christopher Strachey and Dietrich Prinz produce some of the first programs to play board games on computers.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Dartmouth workshop coins the field of AI
description: Researchers gather at Dartmouth College and popularize the term artificial intelligence.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Perceptron is introduced
description: Frank Rosenblatt unveils the perceptron, an influential early learning machine.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: ELIZA is created
description: Joseph Weizenbaum develops ELIZA, a landmark natural-language program.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Shakey the Robot is demonstrated
description: SRI's mobile robot integrates perception, planning, and action in a single system.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: MYCIN project begins
description: Researchers at Stanford build an expert system for medical diagnosis, showing AI's practical potential.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: First AI winter begins
description: Funding and expectations contract as earlier promises prove difficult to realize.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Expert systems boom reaches industry
description: Commercial adoption of expert systems brings AI into major businesses.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Backpropagation helps revive neural networks
description: Research on backpropagation strengthens multi-layer neural-network training.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Deep Blue defeats Garry Kasparov
description: IBM's Deep Blue beats the world chess champion in a match victory for machine play.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Deep learning gains renewed momentum
description: Geoffrey Hinton and collaborators popularize methods for training deeper neural networks.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: ImageNet project accelerates vision research
description: The ImageNet dataset gives machine-learning researchers a powerful benchmark for image recognition.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: IBM Watson wins on Jeopardy!
description: Watson's victory demonstrates major progress in question answering and language processing.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: AlexNet transforms image recognition
description: A deep neural network dramatically improves results in the ImageNet competition.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Generative adversarial networks are introduced
description: GANs open a new era in machine-generated images and media.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: AlphaGo defeats Lee Sedol
description: DeepMind's AlphaGo beats one of the world's leading Go players in a landmark achievement.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: Transformer architecture is published
description: The transformer model reshapes natural-language processing and later generative AI systems.

timeline_description: Major conceptual, technical, and commercial milestones in the history of artificial intelligence from early theory to the generative AI era.
title: ChatGPT is released
description: OpenAI launches ChatGPT, bringing conversational generative AI to a mass global audience.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Zhang Qian's missions open Han contact westward
description: Diplomatic missions under the Han dynasty help create the conditions for sustained overland exchange across Central Asia.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Long-distance silk trade reaches the Roman world
description: Chinese silk becomes a prized luxury in Mediterranean markets through intermediary trade.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Buddhism spreads along caravan routes
description: Merchants and monks help carry Buddhism from South Asia into Central Asia and China.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Kushan Empire strengthens trans-Asian exchange
description: Kushan control across key corridors supports commerce linking India, Central Asia, and China.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Roman embassy reaches Han China
description: Chinese records describe an embassy from the Roman world, symbolizing the route's far-reaching connections.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Sasanian Empire rises in Persia
description: The Sasanians become a major power on the western Silk Road and shape trade between Rome and Asia.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Faxian leaves China for India
description: The Buddhist monk's pilgrimage illustrates the Silk Road as a channel for religious travel and knowledge.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Xuanzang begins his westward journey
description: Xuanzang's pilgrimage to India becomes one of the most famous Silk Road journeys.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Battle of Talas is fought
description: Abbasid forces defeat Tang troops near Talas, marking a major power shift in Central Asia.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Islam expands across Central Asian trade cities
description: Islamic rule and merchant networks become central to Silk Road exchange.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Paper-making knowledge spreads westward
description: Technologies associated with paper production move farther across Eurasia through connected networks.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Song-era commerce invigorates eastern segments
description: Economic growth in China supports renewed trade in luxury goods and ceramics.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Mongol Empire is founded
description: The Mongol unification of the steppe begins to transform transcontinental movement and security.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Marco Polo departs for Asia
description: The Polo journey becomes the best-known European travel account tied to the Silk Road.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Marco Polo reaches the Yuan court
description: His arrival at Kublai Khan's court reflects the openness of the Pax Mongolica era.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Plague spreads through Eurasian trade networks
description: The disease that became the Black Death moves westward along interconnected routes.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Ming dynasty replaces the Yuan
description: The end of Mongol rule in China weakens the political conditions that had favored overland exchange.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Ottomans capture Constantinople
description: The Ottoman conquest reshapes east-west commerce and becomes a landmark in the decline of old overland routes.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: Vasco da Gama reaches India by sea
description: The success of the Cape route shifts long-distance trade toward maritime networks.

timeline_description: Major commercial, political, and cultural milestones in the history of the Eurasian trade routes known as the Silk Road.
title: UNESCO lists Silk Roads corridors as World Heritage
description: Modern heritage recognition underscores the enduring historical significance of the Silk Road.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: World War II ends in Europe
description: The devastation of war creates the political conditions for postwar European integration.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Schuman Declaration is issued
description: French foreign minister Robert Schuman proposes pooling coal and steel production, a founding step toward European integration.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Treaty of Paris is signed
description: Six countries create the European Coal and Steel Community.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Treaties of Rome are signed
description: The six ECSC states establish the European Economic Community and Euratom.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Customs union is completed
description: The EEC abolishes remaining internal customs duties among member states.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: First enlargement takes effect
description: Denmark, Ireland, and the United Kingdom join the European Communities.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: First direct elections to the European Parliament are held
description: Citizens vote directly for the European Parliament for the first time.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Greece joins the European Communities
description: Greece becomes the tenth member state.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Schengen Agreement is signed
description: Five countries agree to work toward abolishing internal border checks.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Spain and Portugal join
description: The Iberian enlargement brings membership to twelve states.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Single European Act is signed
description: The Communities adopt reforms aimed at completing the single market.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Berlin Wall falls
description: The end of the Cold War transforms the future scope of European integration.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Maastricht Treaty is signed
description: The Treaty on European Union creates the European Union and sets a path toward monetary union.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Austria, Finland, and Sweden join
description: Northern enlargement brings the EU to fifteen member states.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Euro is introduced for financial transactions
description: The euro begins as an accounting and financial currency in participating states.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Euro banknotes and coins enter circulation
description: The euro becomes tangible everyday currency across participating member states.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Ten countries join in the largest enlargement
description: A major eastward enlargement significantly expands the Union.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Lisbon Treaty is signed
description: The treaty reforms the EU's institutions after the failure of a constitutional treaty.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: Croatia joins the European Union
description: Croatia becomes the 28th member state.

timeline_description: Major institutional, political, monetary, and enlargement milestones in the development of the European Union from postwar integration to Brexit.
title: United Kingdom leaves the European Union
description: Brexit takes effect, marking the first withdrawal of a member state from the EU.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague emerges in Central or East Asia
description: The pandemic strain associated with the Black Death appears to have originated in Asia before moving westward.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches the Black Sea region
description: The disease arrives in the trading world of the Black Sea, connecting Asian and Mediterranean routes.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Siege of Caffa helps carry plague westward
description: Conflict at Caffa is traditionally linked to the movement of plague into Mediterranean shipping lanes.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches Sicily
description: Infected ships bring the disease to Messina, opening the European phase of the pandemic.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches Genoa and Marseille
description: Major Mediterranean ports become early western entry points for the epidemic.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague arrives in Venice
description: The disease spreads rapidly through one of Europe's most important commercial centers.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches Paris
description: The epidemic advances into northern France and the urban centers of western Europe.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches England
description: The disease arrives in England and soon devastates towns and countryside alike.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Pope Clement VI issues plague-related decrees
description: The papacy responds to the crisis as fear, mortality, and social disorder spread.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches the Low Countries
description: The epidemic continues its sweep through northwestern Europe.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Mass mortality strikes the German lands
description: Central Europe experiences major demographic losses as the plague moves east and north.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Jewish communities face massacres and expulsions
description: Persecution intensifies as frightened populations search for scapegoats.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Plague reaches Scandinavia
description: Norway and neighboring regions are struck as the pandemic extends across northern Europe.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: First great wave begins to subside in much of Europe
description: By this stage the initial pandemic has killed an enormous share of the population in many regions.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Pandemic penetrates Muscovy
description: The plague reaches farther east into Russian lands.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Second major outbreak returns
description: A renewed epidemic wave, sometimes called the 'children's plague,' hits Europe.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Further plague waves prompt public-health responses
description: Repeated outbreaks encourage more organized urban controls and quarantine practices.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Great Plague of London erupts
description: One of the last major urban plague epidemics in England shows the long afterlife of the Black Death era.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Alexandre Yersin identifies the plague bacillus
description: Modern bacteriology links plague to the microorganism later named Yersinia pestis.

timeline_description: Major moments in the spread, social impact, recurrence, and scientific understanding of the Black Death and its aftermath.
title: Ancient DNA studies strengthen the Yersinia pestis explanation
description: Genetic research confirms that the medieval pandemic was caused by plague bacteria.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Seneca Falls Convention is held
description: The Seneca Falls Convention issues a Declaration of Sentiments demanding expanded rights for women.
location: Seneca Falls, New York, United States

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Wyoming Territory grants women the vote
description: Wyoming becomes the first U.S. territory to enfranchise women.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: NWSA and AWSA are founded
description: The U.S. suffrage movement splits into two major organizations with different strategies.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Susan B. Anthony votes illegally and is arrested
description: Her arrest becomes one of the movement's most famous acts of civil disobedience.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: NAWSA is formed
description: The two major U.S. suffrage organizations merge into the National American Woman Suffrage Association.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: New Zealand grants women the vote
description: New Zealand becomes the first self-governing country to grant women the right to vote in national elections.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Australia enfranchises most women federally
description: The Commonwealth Franchise Act extends the federal vote to most Australian women.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Finland grants women full political rights
description: Finland becomes the first European country to grant women full suffrage and eligibility for parliament.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Norway grants women full suffrage
description: Norway joins the early leaders in national female enfranchisement.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Russian Provisional Government enfranchises women
description: The upheaval of 1917 brings voting rights for women in Russia.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Britain passes the Representation of the People Act
description: The act grants voting rights to many women over age thirty.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Canada grants most women federal suffrage
description: Most Canadian women gain the right to vote in federal elections.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Germany enfranchises women
description: Women gain voting rights in the new Weimar Republic.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Nineteenth Amendment is adopted in the United States
description: The U.S. Constitution is amended to prohibit denying the vote on the basis of sex.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Britain equalizes voting rights with men
description: The Equal Franchise Act gives women the vote on the same terms as men.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Spain grants women suffrage
description: The Second Spanish Republic extends the national vote to women.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: France grants women suffrage
description: French women gain the right to vote following liberation in World War II.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Japan grants women suffrage
description: Postwar reforms extend voting rights to women in Japan.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Switzerland grants women federal suffrage
description: Swiss women gain the federal vote after a national referendum.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the global campaign for women's voting rights from early activism to late twentieth-century enfranchisement.
title: Saudi women vote in municipal elections
description: Women in Saudi Arabia take part in voting and candidacy in municipal elections for the first time.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: First recorded ancient Olympic Games
description: The earliest traditionally recorded Olympic festival is held at Olympia.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Ancient Olympic Games are discontinued
description: The ancient Games cease in late antiquity as imperial policy changes the religious landscape.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: International Olympic Committee is founded
description: Pierre de Coubertin's congress establishes the IOC and revives the Olympic project.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: First modern Olympic Games open
description: Athens hosts the first modern Olympics.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Women compete in the Olympics for the first time
description: The Paris Games include women in Olympic competition.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Olympic Charter is first published
description: The IOC codifies key principles for the Olympic Movement.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Olympic Games are canceled during World War I
description: The planned Berlin Games do not take place because of the war.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: First Winter Olympic Games are held
description: Chamonix hosts the first edition of the Winter Games.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Berlin Olympics are staged under Nazi rule
description: The Games become a major propaganda platform while also producing famous athletic performances.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Olympic Games are canceled during World War II
description: The global war prevents the scheduled Games from taking place.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Olympic Games are canceled again during World War II
description: A second wartime cancellation interrupts the Olympic cycle.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: London hosts the postwar 'Austerity Games'
description: The Olympics return after the war in a symbolically important revival.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Rome stages the first fully televised Summer Olympics
description: Television greatly expands the Games' global audience.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Munich massacre shocks the Games
description: The killing of Israeli team members by terrorists transforms Olympic security.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: U.S.-led boycott affects the Moscow Olympics
description: Cold War tensions reshape participation in the Moscow Games.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Soviet-led boycott affects the Los Angeles Olympics
description: A retaliatory boycott marks a second heavily politicized Summer Games in the Cold War.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Barcelona hosts a post-Cold War Olympics
description: The Barcelona Games symbolize a transformed international environment and urban Olympic model.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Beijing hosts the Olympics
description: China stages a major global showcase through the Summer Games.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Tokyo Olympics open after pandemic delay
description: The Tokyo 2020 Games begin one year late because of the COVID-19 pandemic.

timeline_description: Major milestones in the ancient and modern Olympic Games, including institutional reforms, wartime interruptions, and global expansion.
title: Paris hosts the Summer Olympics
description: Paris opens the Summer Games, marking the city's third time hosting the modern Olympics.
